projectDescription: SmartAgro Connect is a comprehensive B2B agricultural marketplace platform that revolutionizes how farmers, agents, and wholesale buyers interact in the agricultural supply chain. By eliminating intermediaries and ensuring transparency, it creates a more efficient and profitable ecosystem. The platform features multi-role dashboards, real-time product catalogs, AI-powered crop recommendations, plant disease detection, smart irrigation planning, and secure payment processing with Stripe.
features: Designed and applied RESTful APIs using Express.js and MongoDB to manage marketplace transactions between farmers, agents, and buyers.
Built a role-based access control (RBAC) system supporting three distinct user roles with route-level authorization middleware.
Applied modular MVC architecture to separate business logic, improving code maintainability and enabling future scalability.
Developed a responsive React.js frontend with Tailwind CSS, ensuring cross-device compatibility and clean UX.

projectDescription: ElevateEx connects students, instructors, and admins. Students enroll in courses and track progress. Instructors create and submit courses. Admins manage users and content. ElevateEx enhances learning with a user-friendly interface.
features: Architected a multi-role EdTech ecosystem with dedicated dashboards and role-based workflows for students, instructors, and administrators.
Implemented secure authentication and session management using Firebase Auth, integrated with protected API communication via Axios.
Developed core learning modules, including course publishing, instructor approval cycles, enrollment management, and assignment submission systems.
Leveraged React Query for efficient server-state management and reusable UI states, ensuring a high-performance, scalable frontend.

projectDescription: Trip_Flip is a hotel management web application for exploring and booking hotel services worldwide. Users sign up, book rooms, manage bookings, and share experiences through a user-friendly interface.
features: Executed multi-provider user authentication (email, Google, and GitHub) using secure OAuth 2.0 flows.
Built a full hotel room booking and management system with real-time availability tracking and booking state management.
Developed a post-checkout review and ratings feature, enhancing user trust and engagement.
Integrated protected API routes with JWT-based session management for secure data access.
